name: islm i+1 story dataset v2 (teacher-regen, EXAM targets, humanized, en)
provenance: islm.datagen.teacher --targets exam, then humanizer pass (em/en dashes removed; targets preserved) + second-pass re-validation + curate dedup
quality: coherence=2 & task_quality=2 for 100%; interestingness>=1 all; 0 em/en dashes; every story re-validated hard_pass with all targets present
schema: chat records system+user+assistant; metadata has judge_scores, humanized=true, source=teacher-v2
